sections.title: About This Starter
sections.text: This repository is an upstream starter for profile-link sites. It is designed to be forked, edited through JSON files, and reused with placeholder-safe example data.

body.title: What to replace
body.text: Update the placeholder identity, links, contact details, legal copy, and images before publishing.

body.title: Where to edit
body.text: Most forks only need config/site.json, config/profile.json, config/links.json, config/llms.json, config/legal/*.json, and public/images/.

qna.question: Can I reuse this starter for my own profile or brand?
qna.answer: Yes. Fork it, replace the placeholder content, and adjust the legal and SEO settings for your own deployment.

qna.question: Which files usually need edits first?
qna.answer: Most forks start with config/site.json, config/profile.json, config/links.json, config/llms.json, config/legal/*.json, and public/images/.
